premise_set: P := p_a + Axioms 1-5 + Assumption 6 + emitted OPH nodes D1-D10 + current public D12 quark objects
derived_closure_chain: log g_u = A_q^phys - (A_ud * sigma_seed_ud - B_ud * eta_ud)
log g_d = A_q^phys - (A_ud * sigma_seed_ud + B_ud * eta_ud)
(m_u, m_d, m_s, m_c, m_b, m_t) follow from the ordered three-point quadratic readout
theorem_statement: P + H_mass + H_phys + H_abs implies Theta_ud^mass, Theta_ud^phys, Theta_ud^abs, and therefore the physical quark sextet.
